text: In software development, testing plays a crucial role in ensuring quality and reliability. There are several types of tests. **Unit tests** check individual components, like a single function, while **integration tests** verify that different parts of the system work together correctly. Many developers use **test-driven development (TDD)**, where they write tests before writing the actual code. This approach helps them think through requirements early. Ultimately, thorough testing builds **confidence**. When you know your code is well-tested, you can make changes or add new features without worrying about breaking existing functionality. This leads to faster development and more stable software.
